_about: Labeled eval set for the FlashRank rerank quality-lift probe (issue #46). Each query has a hand-verified relevance predicate that identifies the genuinely-relevant drawer(s) in a candidate pool pulled from the live palace. Relevance is matched structurally (source_file glob + a content substring that was read and confirmed against the live drawer) rather than by frozen drawer_id, so the set survives drawer-id churn and re-mining. See docs/evals/rerank-eval-2026-05-27.md for how this set was built and its limitations.
_label_method: A candidate is 'relevant' iff (source_file matches source_glob if given) AND (any substring in content_any appears in its text). All predicates were verified by reading the matched drawers via mempalace_search on 2026-05-27 against the production palace (familiar:8085, postgres backend, ~375k drawers).

queries.query: kill-cascade incident user systemd units palace daemon
queries.intent: Find the explanation of why duplicate user+system systemd units caused an infinite restart kill-cascade for palace-daemon.

content_any: kill each other in a kill cascade

queries.query: FlashRank rerank gated env var default true model TinyBERT
queries.intent: Find the record describing the FlashRank rerank spike: ms-marco-TinyBERT model, PALACE_RERANK_ENABLED gate, four /search endpoints.

queries.query: HNSW thread pinning chroma backend num_threads fix
queries.intent: Find the fix that pins hnsw:num_threads=1 on every chroma collection open to avoid the parallel-insert race.

queries.query: manage palace daemon system service sudo systemctl not user unit
queries.intent: Find the guidance that palace-daemon must be a system unit managed via sudo systemctl, never a user unit.

content_any: User-level units must NOT be created

queries.query: implement FlashRank reranking after hybrid rank reorder by score preserve fields
queries.intent: Find the implementation plan step for wiring FlashRank into the search response (lazy Ranker, reorder, preserve fields, PALACE_RERANK_ENABLED).

content_any: Reorder results by FlashRank score, preserving all original fields

queries.query: palace daemon deployment architecture system unit etc systemd
queries.intent: Find the deployment-architecture reference: system unit at /etc/systemd/system/palace-daemon.service.

queries.query: cherry-pick num_threads pin from upstream PR 976 felipetruman fork main
queries.intent: Find the record of cherry-picking @felipetruman's #976 num_threads=1 pin into the fork's main, with the patched call sites.

content_any: from #976 to our fork main. Three call sites patched

queries.query: palace daemon SIGKILL signal 9 OOM killer seconds after startup
queries.intent: Find the diagnosis that palace-daemon was being SIGKILLed ~4s after startup, suspected OOM killer.

content_any: OOM killer or systemd is killing palace-daemon

queries.query: rerank failure mode return original ordering status failed never hard error
queries.intent: Find the note that rerank failures (import/download/runtime) fall back to original ordering with status=failed, preserving the endpoint contract.

content_any: all return original ordering with status=failed

queries.query: mempalace_search limit param max_results silently dropped capped at 5
queries.intent: Find the fix/explanation that the search args must use 'limit' not 'max_results', which was silently dropped and capped responses at 5.

content_any: capped every /search response at the default 5

queries.query: palace canonical room taxonomy architecture decisions problems planning sessions references discoveries
queries.intent: Find the 7-room canonical taxonomy definition (wing = project slug, room in the fixed 7-room set).

content_any: architecture, decisions, problems, planning, sessions, references, discoveries

queries.query: two systemd units fighting for port 8085 fuser -k ExecStartPre ping-pong
queries.intent: Find the diagnosis that both units' ExecStartPre fuser -k 8085/tcp killed each other on port 8085 (ping-pong).

content_any: fuser -k` in each unit's ExecStartPre kills the other
